name: tupper
description: Sandboxed environments for AI agents, backed by Apple Containers.
author: Tupper contributors

scripts.build: bun run --filter='@tupper/core' build && bun run --filter='@tupper/container' --filter='@tupper/firecracker' --filter='@tupper/sdk' build && bun run --filter='@tupper/deepagents' --filter='@tupper/mastra' --filter='@tupper/api' --filter='@tupper/cli' --filter='@tupper/mcp' build
scripts.check:publish: bun run build && bun run --filter='@tupper/*' check:publish
scripts.ci:publish: bun run check:publish && for dir in packages/*/; do [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] || continue; (cd "$dir" && bun publish --tolerate-republish) || exit 1; done && changeset tag
